items.name: skills
items.description: Original and practical skills for AI builders.

items.name: xiaoyan-ai-dev-assistant
items.description: 基于 RAG 混合检索与多轮记忆的 AI 研发助手，支持团队知识问答，也适合新手学习 RAG 应用开发。

items.name: oh-my-skills
items.description: A curated collection of reusable skills for AI coding assistants

items.name: shotsmash
items.description: Auto-shrink macOS screenshots to WebP. Cut Claude Code / Cursor / Codex vision token costs by up to 78%.

items.name: ShadowScan
items.description: ShadowScan 是一款面向安全从业人员的自动化信息泄露扫描与资产测绘工具。深度整合多平台搜索引擎，通过自动化 Dork 语法扫描发现暴露在公网的敏感文件，并自动提取身份证号、手机号、学号、邮箱、银行卡号等个人敏感信息（PII）。  支持 **Bing / FoFa / Hunter / Quake / Shodan / Censys / Zoomeye / 0.zone / DayDayMap ** 等主流搜索引擎与资产测绘平台。

items.name: Hent-ai
items.description: Emotion Image Attachment Plugin for OpenClaw — Auto-classify emotions via LLM and attach matching images to Discord messages

items.name: aixbdd
items.description: AlxBDD turns product iterations into flowcharts, Gherkin, coverage-oriented test plans, and RED->GREEN->REFACTOR behavior-driven one-shot development harness with faithful reasoning and built-in reconciliation for requirement changes.

items.name: FujiSim
items.description: A cross-platform desktop application for high-fidelity Fujifilm film simulation, built with Tauri 2, Rust, React 18, and TypeScript.

items.name: gen-pseudocode-skill
items.description: Reconstruct publication-quality LaTeX pseudocode (algorithm2e) from academic papers, source code, and research projects.

items.name: cord
items.description: Cord — distributed agent fabric for LLMs, MCP servers and AI agents. Discover any LLM CLI / HTTP backend / MCP server across machines via natural-language semantic search. Built in Rust.

items.name: grant
items.description: 解字计划 — 大学生 AI 资助项目 / Jiezi Grant

items.name: Visiomaster
items.description: 参考 ppt-master 思路构建的 Visio 图形重建工具包，将流程图、架构图和论文模块图从图片重建为可编辑 .vsdx，并导出 SVG/PNG。

items.name: Medivault--next-generation-patient-portal
items.description: A next-generation patient portal and medical registry system featuring AI-powered medical document analysis (Gemini), rapid patient summaries (Groq), ABHA QR integration, and secure specialist booking.
